Commercial Doors, Frames, Hardware, & Access Control Specialist

Complete turnkey solutions and in-house locksmithing. Serving Monterey Bay's largest commercial projects with direct vendor pricing and full-service installation since 2007.

Competitive pricing from Allegion & major manufacturers

Full-Service Delivery

Supply, install, service, and maintain - one partner for everything

Proven at Scale

Hotels, colleges, commercial buildings - we handle complex projects

30+ Years Experience

Family business with deep construction and access control expertise

AUTHORIZED PARTNERS

Complete turnkey solutions and in-house locksmithing.

Doors, frames, and hardware specified, supplied, installed, and keyed — all under one roof.

Complete Doors, Frames, Hardware, & Access Control Solutions

Turnkey delivery and in-house locksmithing — everything you need for commercial openings

Commercial & Custom Wood Doors

Hollow metal, custom wood, and specialty doors — supplied and installed. We sell doors and trim direct, and we'll even machine a door you bought somewhere else.

Learn More

Commercial Door Hardware

Exit devices, locksets, door closers from top manufacturers. Direct vendor pricing with expert installation.

Learn More

Access Control Systems

Card readers, control panels, software integration. Professional installation and training for hotels, colleges, and commercial buildings.

Learn More

Service & Maintenance

Ongoing support, emergency repairs, system updates. We installed it - we'll keep it running.

Learn More

FEATURED PRODUCTS

Direct access to premium door hardware

Cylindrical Lock

Accentra 4708LN

Classroom function cylindrical lock, keyed random in PARA or 2803 keyway

Access Control

Centrios CEB100 AU

Grade 1 cylindrical lock with Bluetooth mobile access and 9V backup

Door Closer

SARGENT EN 1431 UH TB

Surface door closer with hold open arm and thru bolts

Health Care Solutions

SARGENT 8265 ALP 32D

Mortise lock with push/pull trim for healthcare environments
See All 498 Products →

Doors, Frames & Custom Trim

A complete opening — not just the lock

We supply and install interior and exterior doors, hollow-metal frames, custom trim, and millwork from the manufacturers that build for commercial scale.

Commercial Doors

Custom wood, hollow metal, glass, blast-rated, and STC acoustic doors for homes, offices, hotels, healthcare, and institutional projects.

Lynden Door • TM Cobb • Jeld-Wen • Oregon Door • Ironwood Doors

Hollow Metal & Frames

Knock-down and welded hollow metal frames, fire-rated assemblies, and matched openings. Specified, supplied, and field-installed by our team.

Orepac • Lynden • project-specific manufacturers

Custom Trim & Millwork

Premium mouldings, casings, base, and architectural trim sourced from Metrie (El & El) and Orepac. Field-stained and pre-finished options available.

Metrie / El & El • Orepac

See Our Door & Millwork Partners

No Job Too Big or Too Small

Big job or small job — bring it to us

Local contractors and builders: from a full plan package to a single opening, we handle doors, frames, hardware, trim, and access control quotes.

Big Job Package

Send us your plans and we'll quote the full opening package — doors, frames, hardware, trim, and access control — for the whole project.

  • ✓ Full plan takeoffs and door schedules
  • ✓ Doors, frames, hardware, and trim quoted together
  • ✓ Access control quotes alongside the openings
  • ✓ Supply and install, or supply only

Small Job Package

Need regular old hardware, one custom door, or trim for a single room? That's a normal day for us — walk in or call.

  • ✓ Standard hardware, supplied over the counter
  • ✓ Bought a door at Home Depot? We'll machine it for your hardware
  • ✓ Custom doors and trim for one opening or a whole remodel
  • ✓ Fast turnaround from our Hollister shop
Submit Your Plans

Email plans, specs, and door schedules to bids@mbdoor.com — or use the form below.

From custom homes to the complex stuff

We supply and install doors, trim, and hardware across every kind of project on the Central Coast

Custom Homes

Tract Homes

Modular Homes

Tenant Improvements

Hotels & Hospitality

Healthcare

Commercial & Government

Featured: Healthcare Specialty Doors

Slider doors for hospitals & patient rooms

AD Systems and Serenity slider systems — STC-rated acoustic, breakaway hardware, ADA-compliant clear openings — specified for ICU, behavioral health, and patient-room applications across Central California hospitals.

Currently specified for: Salinas Surgery Center • Ohana Monterey • regional hospitals throughout the Central Coast.

Healthcare Door Specifications

Why Choose Monterey Bay Door?

Professional-grade solutions with local service. Get the reliability of national suppliers with the personal attention and competitive pricing you deserve.

Direct Vendor Relationships

Competitive pricing without the middleman markup

We source directly from Allegion and major manufacturers. Better pricing, faster delivery, direct technical support.

Full-Service Approach

From specification to service contracts

We don't just supply hardware - we design, install, train, and maintain your systems. One partner, complete solution.

Enterprise Experience

Trusted by major commercial projects

Hotels, colleges, commercial buildings. We understand complex access control requirements and deliver on time, on budget.

The Leader in Major Commercial Projects

From luxury hotels to college campuses, we secure what matters most

Based in Hollister — serving the Central Coast, the Bay Area, and the Central Valley
